subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast inhaled the fragrance of faithfulness, hearken unto the call of him who communeth with thee in spirit and sweet perfume, and say: "I have turned my face..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استنشق رائحه الوفاء اسمع ندآء من یناجیک بروح و ریحان و قل انی وجهت وجهی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
